name: Vivint Solar, Inc.
description: Vivint Solar, Inc. was an American provider of residential photovoltaic solar energy systems. Founded in 2011 as an offshoot of the home automation company Vivint, it specialized in the design, installation, and maintenance of solar energy systems for homeowners. The company offered various financing options, including solar power purchase agreements and leases, to make renewable energy more accessible. Headquartered in Lehi, Utah, Vivint Solar operated as a major player in the residential solar market until it was acquired by Sunrun Inc. in 2020, significantly consolidating the U.S. residential solar industry.
